title: Splatoon plushies
body:
![banner overview of some plushies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8014cf285614d2c5f28ffa52f4c7a206a46d3492.png)
# Splatoon plushies
A resource pack that adds 40+ Splatoon character plushies with the help of CIT compatible mods.
Rename a carved pumpkin to one of the names from the list to get them.
Join the Discord server for issues or suggestions.
### CIT Resewn (1.17 - 1.21.1) or Variants-CIT (1.21.x) required 

## List of the plushies
### Squid sisters
- Callie
- Alterna Callie
- Hypno Callie
- Casual Callie
- Grandfest Callie
- Marie
- Alterna Marie
- Hypno Marie (design by [@MaddeningTrash](https://x.com/MaddeningTrash/status/1784961047230599602))
- Kimono Marie
- Grandfest Marie
### Off the Hook
- Pearl
- Pearl Drone
- Side Order Pearl
- Grandfest Pearl
- Marina
- Side Order Marina
- Grandfest Marina
### Deep Cut
- Shiver
- Grandfest Shiver
- Frye
- Grandfest Frye
- Big Man
- Grandfest Big Man
### Agents
- Agent 3
- Agent 4
- Agent 8
- Neo Agent 3
- Side Order Agent 8
- Parallel Canon
### Misc
- Acht
- Harmony
- Smallfry
- Jelleton (+Tall Jelleton)
- Octotrooper
- Reefslider
- Kraken (+Royale makes it bigger)
- Splat Bomb
- 8-ball
- inf-ball
- Golden Egg
